# AGENTS.md — Duplicacy Exporter

## Project Overview

Real-time Prometheus exporter for Duplicacy backups with live speed, progress, and completion metrics.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/duplicacy-exporter](https://github.com/GeiserX/duplicacy-exporter)
- **Language:** Python
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
